Class Patty

java.lang.Object
RestaurantGame.Toppings
RestaurantGame.CookableToppings
RestaurantGame.Patty
public class Patty extends CookableToppings
Represents a Patty ingredient that changes its cooking state depending on how long it has been cooked. A Patty may be UNDERCOOKED, COOKED, or OVERCOOKED, and its displayed image updates accordingly.

  • Constructor Details

    • Patty

      public Patty(double price, double prepTime, String toppingName)
      Creates a Patty with custom price, prep time, and name.
      Parameters:
      price - : The cost of the Patty ingredient
      prepTime - : The time needed to prepare it
      toppingName - : The name of the topping

    • Patty

      public Patty()
      Default Patty constructor. Creates a Patty costing 1.00 with a prep time of 8 seconds.

  • Method Details

    • updateState

      public void updateState()
      Updates the Patty's cooking state and image depending on how long it has been cooked.

    • setState

      public void setState(Patty.CookingState state)
      Sets the Patty's cooking state.
      Parameters:
      state - : The new state to assign

    • getCookingState

      public Patty.CookingState getCookingState()
      Returns the current cooking state of the Patty. Automatically updates the state before returning it.

    • getPattyImage

      public String getPattyImage()
      Returns the file name of the image representing this Patty’s current state.
